# משרד עורכי דין דרור בן משה — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A boutique premium law firm founded and managed by Attorney Dror Ben Moshe, offering 360-degree legal protection across life's most sensitive crossroads. The firm combines deep strategic legal expertise — honed at one of Israel's leading commercial law firms — with a direct, no-nonsense, client-first approach. The brand identity is built on trust, discretion, and clarity: breaking down legal complexity into clear bottom lines without wasting time. The firm serves three core audiences: future planners and seniors (wills, POA), individuals in financial crisis (enforcement, insolvency), and justice-seekers (small claims, litigation). The tone is authoritative yet accessible, with a premium boutique feel — sophisticated navy and champagne gold palette reinforcing professionalism and reliability.

---

## Pages

### דף הבית
https://-db099680.zappy5.app
משרד בוטיק מוביל המעניק שירותי ייעוץ משפטי prepaid לרגעים הרגישים בחיים: צוואות, ייפוי כוח, חדלות פירעון ותביעות קטנות. דיסקרטיות, בהירות וליווי צמוד מזומן לפתרון. התקשרו עוד היום לפגישת היכרות.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://-db099680.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://-db099680.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About משרד עורכי דין דרור בן משה
A boutique premium law firm founded and managed by Attorney Dror Ben Moshe, offering 360-degree legal protection across life's most sensitive crossroads. The firm combines deep strategic legal expertise — honed at one of Israel's leading commercial law firms — with a direct, no-nonsense, client-first approach. The brand identity is built on trust, discretion, and clarity: breaking down legal complexity into clear bottom lines without wasting time. The firm serves three core audiences: future planners and seniors (wills, POA), individuals in financial crisis (enforcement, insolvency), and justice-seekers (small claims, litigation). The tone is authoritative yet accessible, with a premium boutique feel — sophisticated navy and champagne gold palette reinforcing professionalism and reliability.

## Target Audience
- מתכנני עתיד ובני הגיל השלישי, חייבים ואנשים במשבר כלכלי, נפגעים ומחפשי צדק, בעלי עסקים עם סכסוכים חוזיים
- מתכנני עתיד ובני הגיל השלישי
- חייבים ואנשים במשבר כלכלי
- נפגעים ומחפשי צדק

## Industry
Legal Services
